title: sambucus cochinchinensis
intro: Sambucus cochinchinensis, also known as the Chinese elder or Black elder, is a plant species in the Adoxaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sambucus cochinchinensis include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. Sambucus cochinchinensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
